facts.text: Altoona’s name traces back to either Thomas Jefferson Hinson’s hometown of Allatoona, Georgia, or to Altoona, Pennsylvania, the hometown of its first merchant.
Altoona incorporated on February 12, 1887, only to be abolished on May 27, 1899 after a fire devastated most buildings.
Altoona sits in northeastern Lake County, placing it within the Orlando–Kissimmee–Sanford Metropolitan Statistical Area.
Florida State Road 19 cuts through Altoona’s heart, linking it 8 miles south to Eustis and 14 miles to Tavares.
Healthcare options are limited, often requiring residents to travel to Eustis or Tavares for services, with few local urgent‑care clinics.
Home prices in Altoona have risen about 8% year over year, reflecting steady demand in this quiet rural community.
